DataKitObjectTemplate.entityPayload: {"mlRetrieverConfigurationRepresentation":{"retrieverQueryTemplate":"SELECT \"searchFunc\".\"vector_score__c\" AS \"vector_score__c\", \"searchFunc\".\"keyword_score__c\" AS \"keyword_score__c\", \"searchFunc\".\"hybrid_score__c\" AS \"hybrid_score__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"SourceRecordId__c\" AS \"ChunkDmoSourceRecordId\", \"Review_chunk\".\"RecordId__c\" AS \"RecordId\", \"Review_chunk\".\"Citations__c\" AS \"Citations__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"ChunkType__c\" AS \"ChunkType__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"MediaSource__c\" AS \"MediaSource__c\", \"Review\".\"Actual_Rating__c\" AS \"Actual_Rating\", \"Review\".\"Created_Date__c\" AS \"Created_Date\", \"Review\".\"Vehicle__c\" AS \"Vehicle\", \"Review\".\"Review_Id__c\" AS \"Review_Id\", \"Review\".\"Review_Description__c\" AS \"Review_Description\", \"Review\".\"Default_Rating__c\" AS \"Default_Rating\", \"Review\".\"Model_Number__c\" AS \"Model_Number\", \"Review\".\"KQ_Review_Id__c\" AS \"Key_Qualifier_Review_Id\", \"Review\".\"DataSource__c\" AS \"Data_Source\", \"Review\".\"Account__c\" AS \"Account\", \"Review\".\"Type__c\" AS \"Type\", \"Review\".\"Test_Drive__c\" AS \"Test_Drive\" FROM hybrid_search(TABLE(\"Review_index__dlm\"), :\"_SEARCH_STRING\", :\"_PREFILTER_EXPRESSION\", :\"_NUM_OF_RESULTS\") AS \"searchFunc\" INNER JOIN \"Review_chunk__dlm\" AS \"Review_chunk\" ON \"Review_chunk\".\"RecordId__c\" = \"searchFunc\".\"RecordId__c\" INNER JOIN \"Review__dlm\" AS \"Review\" ON \"Review\".\"Review_Id__c\" = \"Review_chunk\".\"SourceRecordId__c\" AND \"Review\".\"KQ_Review_Id__c\" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM \"Review_chunk\".\"KQ_SourceRecordId__c\" ORDER BY \"searchFunc\".\"hybrid_score__c\" DESC LIMIT {!$_NUM_OF_RESULTS}","sourceDmo":{"name":"Review__dlm","label":"Review"},"searchIndexConfiguration":{"name":"{{18F:Review}}","id":"18Fak000000sJIbEAM","label":"Review"},"isCitationEnabled":false,"label":"Review Retriever","isActive":true,"retrieverQueryTemplateDefinition":{"queryTemplate":"SELECT \"searchFunc\".\"vector_score__c\" AS \"vector_score__c\", \"searchFunc\".\"keyword_score__c\" AS \"keyword_score__c\", \"searchFunc\".\"hybrid_score__c\" AS \"hybrid_score__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"SourceRecordId__c\" AS \"ChunkDmoSourceRecordId\", \"Review_chunk\".\"RecordId__c\" AS \"RecordId\", \"Review_chunk\".\"Citations__c\" AS \"Citations__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"ChunkType__c\" AS \"ChunkType__c\", \"Review_chunk\".\"MediaSource__c\" AS \"MediaSource__c\", \"Review\".\"Actual_Rating__c\" AS \"Actual_Rating\", \"Review\".\"Created_Date__c\" AS \"Created_Date\", \"Review\".\"Vehicle__c\" AS \"Vehicle\", \"Review\".\"Review_Id__c\" AS \"Review_Id\", \"Review\".\"Review_Description__c\" AS \"Review_Description\", \"Review\".\"Default_Rating__c\" AS \"Default_Rating\", \"Review\".\"Model_Number__c\" AS \"Model_Number\", \"Review\".\"KQ_Review_Id__c\" AS \"Key_Qualifier_Review_Id\", \"Review\".\"DataSource__c\" AS \"Data_Source\", \"Review\".\"Account__c\" AS \"Account\", \"Review\".\"Type__c\" AS \"Type\", \"Review\".\"Test_Drive__c\" AS \"Test_Drive\" FROM hybrid_search(TABLE(\"Review_index__dlm\"), :\"_SEARCH_STRING\", :\"_PREFILTER_EXPRESSION\", :\"_NUM_OF_RESULTS\") AS \"searchFunc\" INNER JOIN \"Review_chunk__dlm\" AS \"Review_chunk\" ON \"Review_chunk\".\"RecordId__c\" = \"searchFunc\".\"RecordId__c\" INNER JOIN \"Review__dlm\" AS \"Review\" ON \"Review\".\"Review_Id__c\" = \"Review_chunk\".\"SourceRecordId__c\" AND \"Review\".\"KQ_Review_Id__c\" IS NOT DISTINCT FROM \"Review_chunk\".\"KQ_SourceRecordId__c\" ORDER BY \"searchFunc\".\"hybrid_score__c\" DESC LIMIT {!$_NUM_OF_RESULTS}","queryTemplateVersionNumber":"V3PARAM","queryTemplatePlaceholders":[{"placeholderType":"NamedParameter","placeholderValue":"","placeholderDataType":"Text","placeholderName":":\"_PREFILTER_EXPRESSION\""},{"placeholderType":"NamedParameter","placeholderValue":"","placeholderDataType":"Text","placeholderName":":\"_SEARCH_STRING\""},{"placeholderType":"NamedParameter","placeholderValue":"","placeholderDataType":"Number","placeholderName":":\"_NUM_OF_RESULTS\""},{"placeholderType":"Placeholder","placeholderValue":"","placeholderDataType":"Number","placeholderName":"{!$_NUM_OF_RESULTS}"}],"queryCitationConfiguration":null,"queryTemplateMetadata":{"selectColumns":[{"fieldAlias":"vector_score__c","fieldName":"vector_score__c","tableAlias":"searchFunc","tableName":"searchFunc"},{"fieldAlias":"keyword_score__c","fieldName":"keyword_score__c","tableAlias":"searchFunc","tableName":"searchFunc"},{"fieldAlias":"hybrid_score__c","fieldName":"hybrid_score__c","tableAlias":"searchFunc","tableName":"searchFunc"},{"fieldAlias":"ChunkDmoSourceRecordId","fieldName":"SourceRecordId__c","tableAlias":"Review_chunk","tableName":"Review_chunk__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"RecordId","fieldName":"RecordId__c","tableAlias":"Review_chunk","tableName":"Review_chunk__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"Citations__c","fieldName":"Citations__c","tableAlias":"Review_chunk","tableName":"Review_chunk__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"ChunkType__c","fieldName":"ChunkType__c","tableAlias":"Review_chunk","tableName":"Review_chunk__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"MediaSource__c","fieldName":"MediaSource__c","tableAlias":"Review_chunk","tableName":"Review_chunk__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"Actual_Rating","fieldName":"Actual_Rating__c","tableAlias":"Review","tableName":"Review__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"Created_Date","fieldName":"Created_Date__c","tableAlias":"Review","tableName":"Review__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"Vehicle","fieldName":"Vehicle__c","tableAlias":"Review","tableName":"Review__dlm"},{"fieldAlias":"Review_Id","fieldName":"Review_Id__c","
